name: core
description: v2.6.1 refines Trust Mode `gh` handling: read-only subcommands (label/pr/issue/repo/release/run/workflow/search/auth/secret/variable/gist/codespace/cache/extension/ruleset/project list+view+status, pr diff/checks, repo clone, run watch, gh api default/GET) auto-approve; mutations (create/edit/delete/close/merge/comment/login/logout/ssh/run/cancel/rerun/api -X POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH) still prompt. Mirrors `_git_subcmd`/`is_git_mutation` pattern in `lib/sh_trust_mode.py`. Closes founder-reported approval-fatigue on `gh label list`-class read-only commands. 78 new unit tests, 144/144 green. v2.6.0 ships PROTO-024 V1 client→team feedback fanout: /core:feedback now scrubs locally and pushes to sankalpasawa/sutra-data clients/<install_id>/feedback/ (collaborator-visible inbox, V2 will encrypt). Strengthened scrub_text() with 12+ token detectors (GitHub/OpenAI/AWS/Slack/Stripe/JWT/signed-URL/DSN/webhook/email/phone) plus 40+ char high-entropy fallback. Decoupled /core:feedback from SUTRA_TELEMETRY=0. push.sh stops writing manifest.identity (closes v1.9 PII leak). reset-turn-markers.sh moved from UserPromptSubmit→Stop event (closes spoof vulnerability — no content pattern detection needed). Codex review 2026-04-25 directive 1777062127+1777058308. Governance preserved end-to-end. v2.5.0 adds Tier 1.6 Trust Mode (denylist of 6 prompt categories: git mutations, privilege, recursive delete outside safe paths, disk/system, fetch-and-exec, remote/shared-state). Auto-approves everything else. Per founder approval-fatigue feedback + Codex MODIFY->GO. Operating system for building with AI. v2.1.1 patch (fleet feedback + codex review 2026-04-25): (a) /core:start project-root guard — refuses activation in $HOME or non-project dirs (no .git / package.json / pyproject.toml / Cargo.toml / go.mod / CLAUDE.md), canonical path compare prevents symlink/trailing-slash bypass, .git-as-file recognized for worktrees/submodules. --force override. Prevents home-dir poisoning of ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md with project-scoped governance. Covered by tests/unit/test-start-guard.sh (10 assertions). (b) /core:feedback docs synced to v2.1 reality — --public flag to gh CLI documented (was already wired but commands/feedback.md + usage help still said 'NOT YET IMPLEMENTED'). (c) hooks/reset-turn-markers.sh: root-cause fix — treats empty PROMPT as synthetic turn (was falling through to wipe, caused 2052:1 wipe:skip ratio blocking multi-tool Sutra edits). v2.0 — privacy model replaced: signals-not-content capture, consent-gated disk writes, T4 in-memory-default. User surface = single PRIVACY.md sheet + SUTRA_TELEMETRY=0 opt-out + /sutra feedback manual channel. Legacy v1.9 identity stamping + outbound push DEPRECATED, gated behind SUTRA_LEGACY_TELEMETRY=1. Governance surface preserved: input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace, session-retrieve, per-profile enforcement, C3c token-compression, permission-gate, Bash prompt summarizer, feedback-routing-rule. Codex-reviewed DIRECTIVE-ID 1777065370 (CHANGES-REQUIRED → all P1/P2 findings absorbed).

profile.title: Enforcement profile
profile.description: individual = warn-only, telemetry off. project = warn-only, telemetry on (default). company = HARD block on missing depth markers, telemetry on.
